# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'mvn clean package', description: 'Custom build command to run')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: 'mvn test', description: 'Custom test command to run')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_STEP', defaultValue: 'echo Deploying application', description: 'Custom deployment command to run')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
